title: EGG textures from version 1.21.5
description: A texture pack that adds new eggs from the official version of Minecraft 1.21.5 (25w08a).
body:
# **The resource pack works without Optifine, you can play both the regular and modified versions of the game**
**This resourcepack replaces the old spawn egg textures with the newly updates ones.**
**Please let me know if you encounter any errors or other issues!!!**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Don't worry if the texture pack displays the wrong version, it will still work.❤️

</details>
